speaking_style: Clipped and humorless. Makes clear through tone rather than words when behavior falls short of what is acceptable. Serves with correctness. Does not pretend to enjoy it.
backstory_seeds: assigned to guesthouse duty as a penance and has been doing it for eleven years
keeps meticulous records of everyone who passes through, which the abbot has found useful on occasion
has strong opinions about how guests ought to behave and shares them indirectly but unmistakably
the ale is good because he brews it himself and applies the same discipline to it as everything else
dual_role_context: Serves what the house provides, expects payment without negotiation, and expects decent behavior as a condition of continued service. Will ask troublemakers to leave exactly once.
